title: Qatan #6997
definition:
Hakkatan = "the small"

 1) father of Johanan, the chief of the Bene-Azgad who returned from
    exile with Ezra
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hakkatan = "the small"

 1) father of Johanan, the chief of the Bene-Azgad who returned from
    exile with Ezra

    NASB:  the small, father of a postexilic Isr.
